'''chalozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kvittel|kvittel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kvittel|kvittel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chalozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chælezheth|chælezheth]] || [[word:chælezhej|chælezhej]] || [[word:chælezhesh|chælezhesh]] || [[word:chælezhe|chælezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalolozhoth|chalolozhoth]] || [[word:chalolozhoj|chalolozhoj]] || [[word:chalolozhosh|chalolozhosh]] || [[word:chalolozho|chalolozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalozhoth|chalozhoth]] || [[word:chalozhoj|chalozhoj]] || [[word:chalozhosh|chalozhosh]] || [[word:chalozho|chalozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalofzhoth|chalofzhoth]] || [[word:chalofzhoj|chalofzhoj]] || [[word:chalofzhosh|chalofzhosh]] || [[word:chalofzhof|chalofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chalozhotho|chalozhotho]] || [[word:chalozhojo|chalozhojo]] || [[word:chalozhosho|chalozhosho]] || [[word:chalozhoko|chalozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chalozhoth|chalozhoth]] || [[word:chalozhoj|chalozhoj]] || [[word:chalozhosh|chalozhosh]] || [[word:chalozho|chalozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chalozhothol|chalozhothol]] || [[word:chalozhojol|chalozhojol]] || [[word:chalozhoshol|chalozhoshol]] || [[word:chalozhokol|chalozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chalozhothotho|chalozhothotho]] || [[word:chalozhojojo|chalozhojojo]] || [[word:chalozhoshosho|chalozhoshosho]] || [[word:chalozhoko|chalozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chalozhothon|chalozhothon]] || [[word:chalozhojon|chalozhojon]] || [[word:chalozhoshon|chalozhoshon]] || [[word:chalozhokon|chalozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chalozhothoro|chalozhothoro]] || [[word:chalozhojoro|chalozhojoro]] || [[word:chalozhoshoro|chalozhoshoro]] || [[word:chalozhokoro|chalozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
